system.summary: Drill into soil, stone, or flesh at 1m/round; tendrils deal 1d6 damage to gripped victims.

description.value: These are tough, motile tendrils equipped with acids and abrasive pads that let them bore through almost anything. They can penetrate 5 centimeters of flesh in 1 melee turn, 25 millimeters of wood in 2 melee turns, 5 millimeters of stone in 5 melee turns, 5 millimeters of normal steel in 10 melee turns, and 3 millimeters of duralloy in 10 melee turns.
